info.title: Guild Wars 2 API
info.description: The Guild Wars 2 API is an interface that allows third-party applications to access game data from the Guild Wars 2 servers. It provides various endpoints for retrieving information about achievements, account details, items, and more, enabling developers to create applications that enhance the gaming experience.

get.description: Returns information about achievements.
Returns information about daily achievements.
Returns information about the next daily achievements.
Returns information about achievement groups.
Returns information about achievement categories.
Returns information about an account associated with an API key.

Creates a subtoken that can be used in place of API Keys. The subtoken will have an expiry date and can be limited to a subset of the permissions granted to the API Key used during its creation as well as to a subset of accessible endpoints.
